label: reasoning channel • long structured answer completes without loop or marker leak
query: List the 12 months of the year in order, one per line, each followed by its number of days in a non-leap year. Then end with the single word DONE on its own line.
notes: Looping / degeneration guard on a longer decode: the deterministic DONE sentinel proves the model reached a clean end-of-answer instead of spiralling (a length-cap fake pass would miss the sentinel and fail). Marker sweep and unclosed-span checks ride along on the longer output where leaks are most likely. Off-CI (needs a model).
